hero.subtitle: Beyond Rational designs and manufactures architectural surfaces in Copenhagen and Helsinki. We start with a question — what should a material be? — and stop only when the answer holds up on the building.

items.text_pre: The best acoustic surface is the one

what_we_make.body: We make acoustic surfaces. Compressed wood fibre with nothing else added, specified for ceilings and walls where a room can't be allowed to sound like a recording studio. Our first product, Aisti, ships from Helsinki.

process.body_p1: We adapted our process from the Finnish paper industry. Instead of pressing fibre flat under load, we suspend it in foam — the fibres set into an open cell structure that absorbs sound at the cell level, without binders or plastics.
process.body_p2: It is a slow process. It is also the only one we know that produces a single-substance acoustic plate. Material first, all the way through.

studio.body: Design happens in Copenhagen, manufacturing in Helsinki. We specify, prototype, and ship from the same drawing.

cta.body: The studio answers Monday to Friday. We work directly with architects, no salespeople in the room.
